metadata.title: POS Retail | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Adon ERP POS helps your team sell faster, manage inventory, reward loyal customers, and sync every transaction with accounting.

hero.title: PoS
hero.description: Adon ERP POS helps your team sell faster, manage inventory, reward loyal customers, and sync every transaction with accounting.

complexSection.title: Complex
complexSection.description: Handle advanced retail operations with a clean interface your cashier can understand in minutes.

selfOrderingSection.title: Self ordering
selfOrderingSection.subtitle: for the win
selfOrderingSection.description: Let customers order from a kiosk, QR menu, tablet, or mobile page. Orders flow directly into your POS and inventory.

loyaltySection.title: Reward loyal
loyaltySection.subtitle: customers
loyaltySection.description: Keep customers coming back with points, memberships, coupons, birthday rewards, and targeted retail promotions.

crossChannelSection.title: Cross-channel
crossChannelSection.subtitle: selling
crossChannelSection.description: Sell from your store, website, social channels, and mobile orders while keeping stock and accounting perfectly connected.

aiCheckout.title: AI checkout assistance
aiCheckout.description: Speed up billing with smart product search, shortcut actions, and instant cart suggestions.

offlinePayments.title: Offline payments
offlinePayments.description: Continue selling even when the internet drops, then sync everything automatically.

loyaltyPrograms.title: Loyalty programs
loyaltyPrograms.description: Reward repeat customers with points, coupons, memberships, and custom benefits.

integratedPayments.title: Integrated payments
integratedPayments.description: Accept cards, wallets, cash, and bank payments directly from your Adon ERP POS.

multipleCashiers.title: Multiple cashiers
multipleCashiers.description: Manage shifts, cashier permissions, opening balances, and closing reports.

flexibleInvoicing.title: Flexible invoicing
flexibleInvoicing.description: Print receipts, send invoices by email, or convert POS orders into accounting entries.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand your retail workflow across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern retailers
ctaSection.description: Retail teams use Adon POS to sell faster, manage stock, and serve customers with a connected business system.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Build a connected retail operation with POS, inventory, customer loyalty, ecommerce, and accounting in one Adon ERP workspace.
